en.value: Output 1: Clean Energy Technology and DRR measures Feasibility Studies and design of 145 systems - contributes to outcomes 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6Output 2: Procurement and installation of 145 clean energy systems including DRR measures in communities, schools and health units - contributes to outcome 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6.Output 3:  Capacity building of Local Institutions (community groups and individuals, schools, health units and Local Government) for effective governance and management of installed clean energy technologies and DRR measures - contributes to outcome 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6.Output 4: 77 Newly installed technologies are utilised for productive end uses - contributes to outcome 1 and 6.Output 5: Market enhanced for agriculture, aquaculture and dairy supply chain - contributes to outcome 1 and 6.Output 6: Behaviour change and capacity building programme implemented in targeted communities to sustain project interventions - contributes to outcome 2 to 6.Output 7: Monitoring, evaluation, accountability and learning is carried out, learnings disseminated at multi-stakeholder forums and advocacy for change - contributes to all outcomes.

executing_agency: Ministry of Water Supply, Energy and Irrigation, Ministry of Land Management, Agriculture and Cooperatives, Ministry of Forest, Tourism and Water Supply, Minisry of Water Resource and Energy

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
